result.markdown:
---
title: "Example Assignment"
filters:
  - versions
versions:
  - student:
      out-dir: "../materials/"
      out-file: "example-student.qmd"
      render: false
      yaml:
        execute:
          error: true
        embed-resources: true
  - solution:
      out-dir: ".."
      render: true
      yaml:
        title: "SOLUTION"
        execute:
          eval: true
  - none:
      ignore: true
        
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Question 1

:::{.version-none}

Note: Rendering this qmd will create the versioning file structure one folder level above where this is saved.

*This is a secret message that appears nowhere in the generated version files, because the "ignore" option is set to "true" for the version "none".*
:::


What is 1+1?
*Text that is outside of versioning appears in all versions!*

:::{.version-student}

Hint: Try the code below.
*This will only appear in the student's copy.*

:::


::: {.cell version='student'}

```{.r .cell-code}
1+1
```
:::


:::{.version-solution-student}

It is 2, as you can see below.
*This will only appear in the student subversion of the solutions directory.*

:::



::: {.cell version='solution'}

```{.r .cell-code}
# this will appear in all solution subversions
1+1
```
:::


:::{.version-solution-instructor}

Take off 5 points if they answered 3 instead of 2.
*This will only appear in the instructors subversion of the solutions directory*

:::
